data.body:
Investigation RESULT (INTERMEDIATE, high confidence):
ROOT_CAUSE: .claude/commands/*.md redirect stubs use overly broad plugin detection (grep for 'digital-service-orchestra' in global plugin list) that fires even when plugin skills aren't loaded for the current worktree session, AND stubs lack a fallback for Skill tool failure, causing an infinite loop.
Hypothesis tests (all confirmed):
1. Worktree path doesn't match registered projectPath
2. grep matches too broadly (4 lines from plugins across all projects)
3. No error handling in any of the 23 stubs for 'Unknown skill' failure
4. '3 skills' count matches commands/ dir (commit, end, review), not skills/ dir (32 dirs)
5. All 23 stubs identical two-branch pattern
6. No existing test covers this scenario
Recommended fix: Add third-branch fallback to all 23 stubs — if Skill tool fails, read SKILL.md directly.
